requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall become effective from the date of issuance unless indicated
otherwise.
requirements.object: date of issuance unless indicated otherwise

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial Company
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an 'NBFC'), for
all layers, unless specified otherwise:
(1) NBFC-D registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934;
requirements.object: Non-Banking Financial Company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an 'NBFC'), for all layers

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions contained in Paragraph 98 to Paragraph 100 shall be applicable for
NBFC-P2P registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934;
requirements.object: registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) Annual Percentage Rate (APR) means the annual cost of credit to the
borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the
credit facility.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) Annual Percentage Rate (APR) means the annual cost of credit to the borrower which includes interest rate

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(3) Eligible Collateral shall have the same meaning as defined in Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions,
2025.
requirements.object: as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Jewellery shall have the same meaning as defined in Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) Loan to Value (LTV) ratio shall have the same meaning as defined in Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions,
2025.
requirements.object: as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) Microfinance loan shall have the same meaning as defined in Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Microfinance Institution)
Directions, 2025
(10) Ornaments shall have the same meaning as defined in Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Microfinance Institution) Directions, 2025 (10) Ornaments

requirements.full_sentence:
(11) Personal Loans, as referred in Sections D & F of Chapter III, shall have the
same meaning as defined in XBRL Returns - Harmonization of Banking
Statistics dated January 04, 2018, as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: as defined in XBRL Returns - Harmonization of Banking Statistics dated January 04, 2018, as amended from time to time

requirements.full_sentence: (12) Regulated Entities (REs), for the limited purpose of this Direction, shall mean

An NBFC shall have Board approved policies and review mechanisms in place to
ensure responsible business conduct.
requirements.object: and review mechanisms in place to ensure responsible business conduct

requirements.full_sentence:
A.1 Board approved policies
(1) Fair Practices Code, which shall preferably be in the vernacular language, or a
language as understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: vernacular language, or a language as understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Grievance redressal mechanism
Note: The grievance redressal mechanism shall ensure that all disputes arising
out of the decisions of the functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at
the next higher level.
requirements.object: arising out of the decisions of the functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at the next higher level

requirements.full_sentence:
Note: The guidelines indicated in the Fair Practices Code about transparency
in respect of terms and conditions of the loans shall also be considered.

The Board of Directors shall also provide for periodical review of the compliance of
the Fair Practices Code and the functioning of the grievance redressal mechanism
at various levels of management.
requirements.object: review of the compliance of the Fair Practices Code and the functioning of the grievance redressal mechanism at various le

requirements.full_sentence:
A consolidated report of such reviews shall be
submitted to the Board at regular intervals.
requirements.object: Board at regular intervals

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs having customer interface shall adopt the guidelines enumerated below:
A.1 Applications for loans and their processing
requirements.object: below: A

requirements.full_sentence:
All communications to the borrower shall be in the vernacular language or a
language as understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: language or a language as understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Loan application forms shall include necessary information which affects the
interest of the borrower, so that a meaningful comparison with the terms and
conditions offered by another lender can be made, and informed decision can be
taken by the borrower.
requirements.object: affects the interest of the borrower, so that a meaningful comparison with the terms and conditions offered by ano

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan application form shall indicate the documents
required to be submitted with the application form.
requirements.object: to be submitted with the application form

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall devise a system of giving acknowledgement for receipt of all loan
applications.
requirements.object: giving acknowledgement for receipt of all loan applications

requirements.full_sentence:
Preferably, the time frame within which loan applications will be
disposed of shall also be indicated in the acknowledgement.
requirements.object: the acknowledgement

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall convey in writing to the borrower in the vernacular language as
understood by the borrower by means of sanction letter or otherwise, the amount
of loan sanctioned along with the terms and conditions including annualised rate
of interest and method of application thereof and keep the acceptance of these
terms and conditions by the borrower on its record.
requirements.object: the borrower in the vernacular language as understood by the borrower by means of sanction letter or otherwise, the amount of loa

requirements.full_sentence:
As complaints received against
NBFCs generally pertain to charging of high interest/penal charges, an NBFC shall
mention the penalties charged for late repayment in bold in the loan agreement.
requirements.object: for late repayment in bold in the loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
Borrowers may not be fully aware of the terms and conditions of the loans including
rate of interest at the time of sanction of loans, either because the NBFC does not
provide details of the same or the borrower has no time to look into detailed
agreement.
requirements.object: the terms and conditions of the loans including rate of interest at the time of sanction of loans, either because the NBFC does not

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC,
shall furnish a copy of the loan agreement as understood by the borrower along
with a copy each of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to all the borrowers
at the time of sanction / disbursement of loans.
requirements.object: the loan agreement as understood by the borrower along with a copy each of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to all the bo

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall give notice to the borrower in the vernacular language or a
language as understood by the borrower of any change in the terms and conditions
including disbursement schedule, interest rates, service charges, prepayment
charges etc.
requirements.object: borrower in the vernacular language or a language as understood by the borrower of any change in the terms and conditions including

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall also ensure that changes in interest rates and
charges are effected only prospectively.
requirements.object: in interest rates and charges are effected only prospectively

requirements.full_sentence:
A suitable condition in this regard must be
incorporated in the loan agreement.
requirements.object: loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
Decision to recall / accelerate payment or performance under the agreement shall
be in consonance with the loan agreement.
requirements.object: the loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall release all securities on repayment of all dues or on realisation of
the outstanding amount of loan subject to any legitimate right or lien for any other
claim they may have against borrower.
requirements.object: repayment of all dues or on realisation of the outstanding amount of loan subject to any legitimate right or lien for any ot

conditions: If such right of set off is to be exercised
requirements.full_sentence:
If such right of set off is to be exercised, the
borrower shall be given notice about the same with full particulars about the
remaining claims and the conditions under which the NBFC is entitled to retain the
securities till the relevant claim is settled/paid.
requirements.object: the same with full particulars about the remaining claims and the conditions under which the NBFC is entitled to retain the secu

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall refrain from interference in the affairs of the borrower except for
the purposes provided in the terms and conditions of the loan agreement (unless
information, not earlier disclosed by the borrower, has been noticed).
requirements.object: the affairs of the borrower except for the purposes provided in the terms and conditions of the loan agreement (unless in

conditions: In case of receipt of request from the borrower for transfer of borrowal account
requirements.timeline: within 21 days from the date of receipt of request
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of receipt of request from the borrower for transfer of borrowal account,
the consent or otherwise i.e., objection of the NBFC, if any, shall be conveyed
within 21 days from the date of receipt of request.
requirements.object: days from the date of receipt of request

requirements.full_sentence:
Such transfer shall be as per
transparent contractual terms in consonance with law.
requirements.object: contractual terms in consonance with law

requirements.full_sentence:
In the matter of recovery of loans, an NBFC shall not resort to undue harassment
viz., persistently bothering the borrowers at odd hours, use muscle power for
recovery of loans etc.
requirements.object: viz

requirements.full_sentence:
As complaints from customers also include rude behaviour
from the staff of the companies, an NBFC shall ensure that the staff is adequately
trained to deal with the customers in an appropriate manner.
requirements.object: is adequately trained to deal with the customers in an appropriate manner

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall have the freedom of drafting the Fair Practices Code, enhancing
the scope of the guidelines but in no way sacrificing the spirit underlying the above
<image>
guidelines.
requirements.object: drafting the Fair Practices Code, enhancing the scope of the guidelines but in no way sacrificing the spirit underlying the above

requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall be put up on its website, for the information of various
stakeholders.
requirements.object: its website, for the information of various stakeholders

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of an NBFC shall adopt an interest rate model taking into account
relevant factors such as cost of funds, margin and risk premium and determine the
rate of interest to be charged for loans and advances.
requirements.object: model taking into account relevant factors such as cost of funds, margin and risk premium and determine the rate of interest to

requirements.full_sentence:
The rate of interest and the
approach for gradations of risk and rationale for charging different rate of interest
to different categories of borrowers shall be disclosed to the borrower or customer
in the application form and communicated explicitly in the sanction letter.
requirements.object: borrower or customer in the application form and communicated explicitly in the sanction letter

requirements.full_sentence:
The rates of interest and the approach for gradation of risks shall also be made
available on the website of the companies or published in the relevant newspapers.
requirements.object: on the website of the companies or published in the relevant newspapers

requirements.full_sentence:
The information published on the website or otherwise published shall be updated
whenever there is a change in the rates of interest.
requirements.object: is a change in the rates of interest

requirements.full_sentence:
The rate of interest must be annualised rate so that the borrower is aware of the
exact rates that would be charged to the account.
requirements.object: that the borrower is aware of the exact rates that would be charged to the account

requirements.full_sentence:
Though
interest rates are not regulated by the Reserve Bank, rates of interest beyond a
certain level may be seen to be excessive and can neither be sustainable nor be
conforming to normal financial practice.
requirements.object: excessive and can neither be sustainable nor be conforming to normal financial practice

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC must have a built-in re-possession clause in the contract / loan
agreement with the borrower which must be legally enforceable.
requirements.object: clause in the contract / loan agreement with the borrower which must be legally enforceable

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure
transparency, the terms and conditions of the contract/loan agreement shall also
contain provisions regarding:
(1) Notice period before taking possession;
requirements.object: (1) Notice period before taking possession

requirements.full_sentence: A copy of such terms and conditions must be made available to the borrower.
requirements.object: the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
An
NBFC shall invariably furnish a copy of the loan agreement along with a copy each
of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to all the borrowers at the time of
sanction/ disbursement of loans, which forms a key component of such contracts/
loan agreements.
requirements.object: of the loan agreement along with a copy each of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to all the borrowers at the time

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall not discriminate in extending products and facilities including loan
facilities to physically / visually challenged applicants on grounds of disability.
requirements.object: and facilities including loan facilities to physically / visually challenged applicants on grounds of disability

requirements.full_sentence:
All
branches of the NBFC shall render all possible assistance to such persons for
availing of the various business facilities.
requirements.object: to such persons for availing of the various business facilities

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall include a suitable module
containing the rights of persons with disabilities guaranteed to them by the law and
international conventions, in all the training programmes conducted for their
employees at all levels.
requirements.object: containing the rights of persons with disabilities guaranteed to them by the law and international conventions, in all the t

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the NBFC shall ensure redressal of grievances of
persons with disabilities under the Grievance Redressal Mechanism already set up
by them.
requirements.object: of persons with disabilities under the Grievance Redressal Mechanism already set up by them

requirements.full_sentence:
The following instructions shall be applicable in cases of all retail and MSME term
loan products extended by all NBFCs.
requirements.object: of all retail and MSME term loan products extended by all NBFCs

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit card receivables are exempted from
the provisions given below:
(1) An NBFC shall provide a KFS to all prospective borrowers to help them take an
informed view before executing the loan contract, as per the standardised format
given in the Annex I.
requirements.object: all prospective borrowers to help them take an informed view before executing the loan contract, as per the standardised format given

requirements.full_sentence:
The KFS shall be written in a language understood by such
borrowers.
requirements.object: language understood by such borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
Contents of KFS shall be explained to the borrower and an
acknowledgement shall be obtained that they have understood the same.
requirements.object: borrower and an acknowledgement shall be obtained that they have understood the same

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The KFS shall be provided with a unique proposal number and shall have a
validity period of at least three working days for loans having tenor of seven days
<image>
or more, and a validity period of one working day for loans having tenor of less than
seven days.
requirements.object: unique proposal number and shall have a validity period of at least three working days for loans having tenor of seven days <image>

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall
be bound by the terms of the loan indicated in the KFS, if agreed to by the borrower
during the validity period.
requirements.object: terms of the loan indicated in the KFS

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The KFS shall also include a computation sheet of annual percentage rate
(APR), and the amortisation schedule of the loan over the loan tenor.
requirements.object: sheet of annual percentage rate (APR), and the amortisation schedule of the loan over the loan tenor

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall adhere to following instructions for charging penal charges on
loans.
requirements.object: for charging penal charges on loans

requirements.full_sentence:
These instructions shall be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the
NBFC but shall not apply to Credit Cards, External Commercial Borrowings, Trade
Credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and Structured Obligations which
are covered under product specific directions, as also other foreign currency loans.
requirements.object: External Commercial Borrowings, Trade Credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and Structured Obligations which are cov

conditions: if charged
requirements.full_sentence:
(1) Penalty, if charged, for non-compliance of material terms and conditions of loan
contract by the borrower shall be treated as 'penal charges' and shall not be levied
in the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the
advances.
requirements.object: form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be no capitalisation of penal charges, i.e., no further interest
computed on such charges.
requirements.object: penal charges, i

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the NBFC may charge
interest on unpaid interest (including on unpaid EMI) at the contracted rate of
interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rate of interest.
requirements.object: interest (including on unpaid EMI) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rat

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall put in place an appropriate policy framework meeting the following
requirements for implementation and compliance:
(1) At the time of sanction, an NBFC shall clearly communicate to the borrowers
about the possible impact of change in benchmark interest rate on the loan
leading to changes in EMI and/or tenor or both.
requirements.object: appropriate policy framework meeting the following requirements for implementation and compliance: (1) At the time of sanction, an NBF

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequently, any increase in
the EMI/ tenor or both on account of the above shall be communicated to the
borrower immediately through appropriate channels.
requirements.object: borrower immediately through appropriate channels

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) At the time of reset of interest rates, an NBFC may, at its option, provide a
choice to the borrowers to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved
policy.
requirements.object: provide a choice to the borrowers to switch over to a fixed rate as per its Board approved policy

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy, inter alia, may also specify the number of times a borrower
will be allowed to switch during the tenor of the loan.
requirements.object: of times a borrower will be allowed to switch during the tenor of the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The borrowers shall also be given the choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI
or elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options;
requirements.object: choice to opt for (i) enhancement in EMI or elongation of tenor or for a combination of both options

requirements.full_sentence:
Levy of
foreclosure charges/ pre-payment penalty shall be subject to extant
instructions.
requirements.object: instructions

requirements.full_sentence: the NBFC shall provide the following options to the borrowers:
requirements.object: to the borrowers:

conditions: In case of loans linked to an external benchmark
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans linked to an external benchmark, the NBFC
shall put in place adequate information systems to monitor transmission of changes
<image>
in the benchmark rate to the lending rate.
requirements.object: information systems to monitor transmission of changes <image> in the benchmark rate to the lending rate

conditions: In case of existing loans sanctioned or renewed on or before December 31
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of existing loans sanctioned or renewed on or before December 31, 2025,
an NBFC shall not levy pre-payment charges on any floating rate term loan
sanctioned for purposes other than business to individual borrowers, with or
without co-obligant(s).
requirements.object: any floating rate term loan sanctioned for purposes other than business to individual borrowers, with or without co-obliga

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment
charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned
or renewed on or after January 1, 2026:
(1) For all floating rate loans granted for purposes other than business to
individuals, with or without co-obligant(s), an NBFC shall not levy pre-payment
charges.
(i) an NBFC-Upper Layer shall not levy any pre-payment charges.

(ii) an NBFC-Middle Layer shall not levy any pre-payment charges on loans
with sanctioned amount/ limit up to ₹50 lakh.
requirements.object: on loans with sanctioned amount/ limit up to ₹50 lakh

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The Directions at paragraphs 34(1) and 34(2) above shall be applicable
irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part
or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period.
requirements.object: the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In cases other than those mentioned at paragraphs 34(1) and 34(2) above, pre-
payment charges, if any, shall be as per the approved policy of the NBFC.
requirements.object: approved policy of the NBFC

conditions: in case of term loans
if levied by the NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of term loans, pre-payment charges, if levied by the NBFC,
shall be based on the amount being prepaid.
requirements.object: amount being prepaid

conditions:
In case of cash credit/ overdraft
facilities
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of cash credit/ overdraft
facilities, pre-payment charges on closure of the facility before the due date
shall be levied on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit.
requirements.object: amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit

conditions: In case of cash credit/ overdraft facilities
provided that the facility gets closed on the due date
requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(6) In case of cash credit/ overdraft facilities, no pre-payment charges shall be
applicable if the borrower intimates the NBFC of his/ her/ its intention not to
renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement,
provided that the facility gets closed on the due date.
requirements.object: borrower intimates the NBFC of his/ her/ its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) An NBFC shall not levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the
instance of the NBFC.
requirements.object: pre-payment is effected at the instance of the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
(8) The applicability or otherwise of pre-payment charges shall be clearly disclosed
in the sanction letter and loan agreement.
requirements.object: the sanction letter and loan agreement

conditions:
in case of loans and
advances where Key Facts Statement (KFS) is to be provided as specified in
paragraph 29
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in case of loans and
advances where Key Facts Statement (KFS) is to be provided as specified in
paragraph 29, the same shall also be mentioned in the KFS.
requirements.object: the KFS

requirements.full_sentence:
No pre-payment
charges which have not been disclosed as specified herein shall be charged by
the NBFC.
requirements.object: NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) The NBFC shall not levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre-
payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the NBFC.
requirements.object: fees retrospectively at the time of pre- payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall release all the original movable / immovable property documents
and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after
full repayment/ settlement of the loan account.
requirements.object: movable / immovable property documents and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full

conditions:
where the
loan account was serviced or any other office of the NBFC where the documents
are available
requirements.full_sentence:
The borrower shall be given the option of collecting the original movable /
immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the
loan account was serviced or any other office of the NBFC where the documents
are available, as per her / his preference.
requirements.object: of collecting the original movable / immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account w

requirements.full_sentence:
The timeline and place of return of original movable / immovable property
documents shall be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or December
1, 2023.
requirements.object: loan sanction letters issued on or December 1, 2023

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to address the contingent event of demise of the sole borrower or joint
borrowers, an NBFC shall have a well laid out procedure for return of original
movable / immovable property documents to the legal heirs.
requirements.object: out procedure for return of original movable / immovable property documents to the legal heirs

requirements.full_sentence:
Such procedure shall
be displayed on the website of the NBFC along with other similar policies and
<image>
procedures for customer information.
requirements.object: website of the NBFC along with other similar policies and <image> procedures for customer information

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of
original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge
satisfaction form with relevant registry beyond 30 days after full repayment/
settlement of loan.
requirements.object: reasons for delay in releasing of original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction f

conditions: In case where the delay is attributable to the NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
In case where the delay is attributable to the NBFC, it shall
compensate the borrower at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay.
requirements.object: the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay

conditions: In case of loss/damage to original movable / immovable property documents
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loss/damage to original movable / immovable property documents,
either in part or in full, an NBFC shall assist the borrower in obtaining
duplicate/certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and
shall bear the associated costs, in addition to paying compensation as indicated at
paragraph 39 above.
requirements.object: obtaining duplicate/certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in addi

requirements.full_sentence:
The compensation provided under these directions shall be without prejudice to
the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law.
requirements.object: the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy on lending against gold and silver collateral, as required in terms of the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities)
Directions, 2025) and hereinafter referred to as the 'policy' in this section / Standard
Operating Procedures (SOPs) prepared under the policy shall cover the conduct
related aspects relating to the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments or coins
made of gold or silver ("eligible collateral" for this section);
requirements.object: aspects relating to the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments or coins made of gold or silver ("eligible collateral" fo

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC, which provides or intends to provide loans against eligible collateral,
shall ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of
gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc.
requirements.object: procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc

requirements.full_sentence:
This procedure shall
be adopted uniformly across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without
any deviation.
requirements.object: all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall display on its website the methodology adopted by it for
determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral
and the price used to value the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral for
determination of LTV ratio.
requirements.object: the methodology adopted by it for determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral
at the time of sanctioning the loan.
requirements.object: borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at the time of sanctioning the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
The deductions relating to stone weight,
fastenings, etc., as part of the assaying procedure shall be explained to the
borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued (as per
paragraph 50 below).
requirements.object: borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued (as per paragraph 50 below)

requirements.full_sentence:
Post pledging, cases involving loss of gold or silver collateral and any deterioration
or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or otherwise
including at the time of return or auction of collateral shall be recorded and
communicated promptly to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s).
requirements.object: promptly to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
The process for making
reimbursement or compensation as per the policy or SOP shall also be
communicated to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s).
requirements.object: the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence: Documentation shall be standardised across all branches of the NBFC.
requirements.object: branches of the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
The loan agreement shall cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as
security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the
<image>
circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period
which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before
the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon
full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus, if any, from the auction of
the pledged eligible collateral and other necessary details.
requirements.object: the eligible collateral taken as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the <image> circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus

requirements.full_sentence:
All applicable charges
payable by the borrower, including those related to assaying, auction, etc., shall be
clearly included in the loan agreement and KFS.
requirements.object: the loan agreement and KFS
e- certificate in duplicate on its letterhead regarding the assay of the collateral and state therein the purity (in terms of

requirements.full_sentence:
One copy
of the certificate or e-certificate shall be kept as part of the loan documents and the
other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement.
requirements.object: of the loan documents and the other copy be given to the borrower under their acknowledgement

requirements.full_sentence:
All communication with the borrower, especially, the terms and conditions of the
loan, or other important communication which affects the interest of the borrower
or the NBFC, shall be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by
the borrower.
requirements.object: of the region or in a language as chosen by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
For an illiterate borrower, important terms and conditions shall be
explained in the presence of a witness, who shall not be an employee of the NBFC.
requirements.object: the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place
and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are
sanctioned against gold or silver collateral.
requirements.object: and facilities are put in place and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are s

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that the gold and/ or silver collateral is handled only in its
branches and only by its employees.
requirements.object: and/ or silver collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its
employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver.
requirements.object: in its branches which are manned by its employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver

requirements.full_sentence:
Normally,
<image>
such loans shall not be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured
facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral.
requirements.object: that do not have appropriate secured facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged eligible collateral may be transported from one branch to another
branch, only as permitted under paragraph 64 below or in case of shifting or closure
of branch(es) or exceptional reasons as per the process laid down by the NBFC in
terms of its policy.
requirements.object: branch to another branch, only as permitted under paragraph 64 below or in case of shifting or closure of branch(es) or except

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the
eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal
audit of all procedures to ensure that these are strictly adhered to.
requirements.object: of systems for storage of the eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal aud

requirements.full_sentence:
As part of internal audit, an NBFC shall carry out periodic surprise verification of
the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof.
requirements.object: verification of the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
A
clause in the loan agreement shall be included for obtaining consent of the
borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible
collateral even in their absence during the tenor of the loan.
requirements.object: consent of the borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in the

requirements.full_sentence:
This aspect shall be
specifically communicated to the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan.
requirements.object: the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to
the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a
maximum period of seven working days upon full repayment or settlement of the
loan.
requirements.object: pledged eligible collateral held as security to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a

requirements.full_sentence:
At the time of release of pledged eligible collateral to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s),
the collateral shall be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate (as per
paragraph 50) to the borrowers' satisfaction.
requirements.object: as per details in the certificate (as per paragraph 50) to the borrowers' satisfaction

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall give adequate notice to the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s), as
applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan
dues prior to initiating the auction procedure.
requirements.object: the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s), as applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prior

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of the notice and
acknowledgement thereof shall be kept on record in both scenarios.
requirements.object: in both scenarios

requirements.full_sentence:
In case the
lender is unable to locate the borrower(s)/ legal heir(s) despite best efforts and
even after issuance of a public notice, it may proceed with the auction, provided
that a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the public notice.

An NBFC shall implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include,
inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in
at least two newspapers, one in the regional language and another in a national
daily.
requirements.object: procedure, which shall include, inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged eligible collateral shall be auctioned by an NBFC only through its
employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer
empanelled by the NBFC as per its policy.
requirements.object: NBFC only through its employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by the NBFC as per its pol

conditions:
where auctions are conducted
by an NBFC through its employees
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where auctions are conducted
by an NBFC through its employees, necessary safeguards such as surprise visits
by regional / controlling officials on periodic basis, coverage under internal audit,
etc., shall be put in place.

An NBFC shall declare a reserve price for the gold and silver collateral at the time
of auction, which shall not be less than 90 per cent of its current value.
requirements.object: per cent of its current value

conditions: Provided that in case auctions fail twice
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that in case auctions fail twice, a reserve price not less than 85 per cent
of its current value shall be adopted.

The first auction shall be conducted physically in the same district in which the
lending branch is located.
requirements.object: the same district in which the lending branch is located

conditions: in case of failure of first auction
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case of failure of first auction, an NBFC may
conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction.
requirements.object: an adjoining district or conduct online auction

requirements.full_sentence:
As a matter of policy, an NBFC or its related parties shall not participate in the
auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest.
requirements.object: to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest

requirements.full_sentence:
After the auction, an NBFC shall mandatorily provide full details of the value
fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: of the value fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

conditions: if any, from the auction of the gold or silver collateral
requirements.full_sentence:
The
surplus, if any, from the auction of the gold or silver collateral, shall be refunded to
the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from
the date of receipt of the full auction proceeds.
requirements.object: borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the date of receipt of the full auction proceeds

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC may recover shortfall, if
any, as per terms of the loan agreement.

conditions:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by an NBFC during the
tenor of loan
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of any damage to the pledged eligible collateral by an NBFC during the
tenor of loan, the cost of repair shall be borne by the NBFC.
requirements.object: NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loss of the pledged eligible collateral and / or any loss emanating from
deterioration or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or
otherwise including at the time of return or auction of collateral, an NBFC shall
<image>
suitably compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

conditions:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or
settlement of loan by the borrower

where reasons for delay are attributable to the
NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of delay in release of the pledged collateral after full repayment or
settlement of loan by the borrower, where reasons for delay are attributable to the
NBFC, the NBFC shall compensate the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) at the rate of
₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 58
above.
requirements.object: legal heir(s) at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay beyond the timeline prescribed at paragraph 58 above

conditions: If the delay is not attributable to the NBFC
requirements.full_sentence:
If the delay is not attributable to the NBFC, it shall communicate reasons
for such delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
requirements.object: delay to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where the borrower(s) /
legal heir(s) has not approached the NBFC for release of pledged eligible collateral
after full repayment or settlement of loan, the NBFC shall issue periodic reminders
to borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or SMS if the email and mobile
number are registered with the NBFC.
requirements.object: borrower(s) / legal heir(s) through letters, email or SMS if the email and mobile number are registered with the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
The pledged gold and / or silver collateral lying with an NBFC beyond two years
from the date of full repayment or settlement of loan shall be treated as unclaimed.

The NBFC shall periodically undertake special drives to ascertain the whereabouts
of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and/ or silver
collateral.
requirements.object: to ascertain the whereabouts of the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) in respect of such unclaimed gold and/ or silver

requirements.full_sentence:
A report on unclaimed gold and /or silver collateral shall be put up to the Customer
Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a
review.
requirements.object: the Customer Service Committee or the Board, as the case may be, at half-yearly intervals for a review

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall refrain from issuance of misleading advertisements containing
unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold and/or silver collateral.
requirements.object: misleading advertisements containing unrealistic claims to promote loans against gold and/or silver collateral

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall ensure that all arrangements for sourcing and/ or recovery of loans
against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable guidelines on
outsourcing and recovery practices.
requirements.object: for sourcing and/ or recovery of loans against eligible collateral, are in compliance with applicable guidelines on outso

requirements.full_sentence:
For prudential related aspects and other instructions, the NBFC shall be guided
by the instructions contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver
<image>
Collateral' in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit
Facilities) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: instructions contained in the Chapter on 'Lending against Gold and Silver <image> Collateral' in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking F

requirements.full_sentence:
A Fair Practices Code (FPC) for microfinance loans based on these directions
shall be put in place by an NBFC with the approval of its Board.
requirements.object: by an NBFC with the approval of its Board

requirements.full_sentence:
The FPC shall be
displayed by the NBFC in all its offices and on its website.
requirements.object: NBFC in all its offices and on its website

requirements.full_sentence:
The FPC should be
issued in a language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: language understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a standard form of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a
language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: of loan agreement for microfinance loans in a language understood by the borrower
to the borrower which shall incorporate the following: (1) Information which adequately identifies the borrower

requirements.full_sentence: All entries in the loan card shall be in a language understood by the borrower.
requirements.object: understood by the borrower

requirements.full_sentence:
Issuance of non-credit products shall be with full consent of the borrowers and fee
structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the
loan card itself.
requirements.object: of the borrowers and fee structure for such products shall be explicitly communicated to the borrower in the loan card itself

requirements.full_sentence: There shall be no pre-payment charge levied on microfinance loans.
requirements.object: levied on microfinance loans

requirements.full_sentence:
Charges, if
any, for delayed payment shall be applied on the overdue amount and not on the
entire loan amount.
requirements.object: overdue amount and not on the entire loan amount

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall prominently display the minimum, maximum and average interest
rates charged on microfinance loans in all its offices, in the literature (information
<image>
booklets/ pamphlets) issued by it and details on its website.
requirements.object: maximum and average interest rates charged on microfinance loans in all its offices, in the literature (information <

requirements.full_sentence:
This information shall
also be included in the supervisory returns and subjected to supervisory scrutiny.
requirements.object: the supervisory returns and subjected to supervisory scrutiny

requirements.full_sentence:
Any change in interest rate or any other charge shall be informed to the borrower
well in advance and these changes shall be effective only prospectively.
requirements.object: borrower well in advance and these changes shall be effective only prospectively

requirements.full_sentence:
As part of their awareness campaigns, Self-Regulatory Organisations (SROs) /
other industry associations may publish the range of interest rates on microfinance
loans charged by their members operating in a district.
requirements.object: interest rates on microfinance loans charged by their members operating in a district

requirements.full_sentence:
SROs / other industry
associations may also sensitize their members against charging of usurious
interest rates.
requirements.object: against charging of usurious interest rates

requirements.full_sentence:
RBI shall also make available information regarding interest charged by NBFCs
on microfinance loans.
requirements.object: regarding interest charged by NBFCs on microfinance loans

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall have a board approved policy regarding the conduct of employees
and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring.
requirements.object: policy regarding the conduct of employees and system for their recruitment, training and monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
This policy shall, inter
alia, lay down minimum qualifications for the staff and shall provide necessary
training tools to deal with the customers.
requirements.object: down minimum qualifications for the staff and shall provide necessary training tools to deal with the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Training to employees shall include
programs to inculcate appropriate behaviour towards customers.
requirements.object: appropriate behaviour towards customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Conduct of
employees towards customers shall also be incorporated appropriately in their
compensation matrix.
requirements.object: in their compensation matrix

requirements.full_sentence:
Field staff shall be trained to make necessary enquiries regarding the income and
existing debt of the household.
requirements.object: necessary enquiries regarding the income and existing debt of the household

requirements.full_sentence: Training, if any, offered to the borrowers shall be free of cost.

An NBFC shall put in place a mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing
repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing
them necessary guidance about the recourse available.
requirements.object: mechanism for identification of the borrowers facing repayment related difficulties, engagement with such borrowers and providing them

requirements.full_sentence:
Recovery shall be made at a designated/ central designated place decided
mutually by the borrower and the NBFC.
requirements.object: designated/ central designated place decided mutually by the borrower and the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
However, field staff shall be allowed to
make recovery at the place of residence or work of the borrower if the borrower
fails to appear at the designated / central designated place on two or more
successive occasions.
requirements.object: recovery at the place of residence or work of the borrower if the borrower fails to appear at the designated / central designated p

requirements.full_sentence: An NBFC or its agent shall not engage in any harsh methods towards recovery.
requirements.object: methods towards recovery

requirements.full_sentence:
Without limiting the general application of the foregoing, following practices shall
be deemed as harsh:
(1) Use of threatening or abusive language
(2) Persistently calling the borrower and/ or calling the borrower before 9:00 a.m.
requirements.object: (1) Use of threatening or abusive language (2) Persistently calling the borrower and/ or calling the borrower before 9:00 a

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Harassing relatives, friends, or co-workers of the borrower
(4) Publishing the name of borrowers
(5) Use or threat of use of violence or other similar means to harm the borrower
or borrower's family/ assets/ reputation
(6) Misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of
non-repayment
requirements.object: or borrower's family/ assets/ reputation (6) Misleading the borrower about the extent of the debt or the consequences of non-repa

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall have a dedicated mechanism for redressal of recovery related
grievances.
requirements.object: for redressal of recovery related grievances

requirements.full_sentence:
The details of this mechanism shall be provided to the borrower at the
time of loan disbursal.
requirements.object: borrower at the time of loan disbursal

requirements.full_sentence:
Recovery agents shall mean agencies engaged by the NBFC for recovery of dues
from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies.
requirements.object: the NBFC for recovery of dues from its borrowers and the employees of these agencies

requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall have a due diligence process in place for engagement of recovery
agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process.
requirements.object: process in place for engagement of recovery agents, which shall, inter alia, cover individuals involved in the recovery process

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall ensure that the recovery agents engaged by them carry out
verification of the antecedents of its employees, which shall include police
verification.
requirements.object: agents engaged by them carry out verification of the antecedents of its employees, which shall include police verification

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall also decide the periodicity at which re-verification of
antecedents shall be resorted to.
requirements.object: at which re-verification of antecedents shall be resorted to

requirements.full_sentence:
To ensure due notice and appropriate authorisation, an NBFC shall provide the
details of recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery.
requirements.object: recovery agents to the borrower while initiating the process of recovery

requirements.full_sentence:
The agent shall also carry a copy of the notice and the authorisation letter from the
NBFC along with the identity card issued to him/her by the NBFC or the agency.
requirements.object: of the notice and the authorisation letter from the NBFC along with the identity card issued to him/her by the NBFC or the agency

conditions:
where the recovery agency is changed by the NBFC during the recovery
process
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, where the recovery agency is changed by the NBFC during the recovery
process, in addition to the NBFC notifying the borrower of the change, the new
<image>
agent shall carry the notice and the authorisation letter along with his/her identity
card.
requirements.object: the authorisation letter along with his/her identity card

requirements.full_sentence:
The notice and the authorisation letter shall, among other details, also include the
contact details of the recovery agency and the NBFC.
requirements.object: also include the contact details of the recovery agency and the NBFC

requirements.full_sentence:
The up-to-date details of the recovery agencies engaged by the NBFC shall also
be hosted on the NBFC's website.
requirements.object: the NBFC's website

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall ensure that the DSA / DMA / Recovery Agents are properly trained
to handle their responsibilities with care and sensitivity, particularly aspects such
as soliciting customers, hours of calling, privacy of customer information and
conveying the correct terms and conditions of the products on offer, etc.
requirements.object: / DMA / Recovery Agents are properly trained to handle their responsibilities with care and sensitivity, particularly aspects such

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall obtain the undertaking of DSA / DMA / Recovery Agents to abide
by the code of conduct.
requirements.object: DSA / DMA / Recovery Agents to abide by the code of conduct

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition, Recovery Agents shall adhere to extant
instructions on Fair Practices Code for NBFCs as also its own code for collection
of dues and repossession of security.
requirements.object: on Fair Practices Code for NBFCs as also its own code for collection of dues and repossession of security

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall strictly ensure that it or its agents do not resort to intimidation or
harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their debt
collection efforts, including acts intended to humiliate publicly or intrude upon the
privacy of the debtors' family members, referees and friends, sending
inappropriate messages either on mobile or through social media, making
threatening and/ or anonymous calls, persistently calling the borrower and/ or
calling the borrower before 8:00 a.m.
requirements.object: or its agents do not resort to intimidation or harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their

requirements.full_sentence:
This direction shall not
be applicable to microfinance loans provided as per Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: loans provided as per Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025
(DSAs / DMAs) who do not have any valid registration certificate from DoT, Government of India, as telemarketers

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs shall engage only those telemarketers who are registered in terms of
<image>
the guidelines issued by TRAI, from time to time, for all their promotional /
telemarketing activities.
requirements.object: who are registered in terms of <image> the guidelines issued by TRAI, from time to time, for all their promotional / t

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall give at least three months public notice prior to the date of
closure of any of its branches/offices in, at least, one leading national newspaper
and a leading local (covering the place of branch / office) vernacular newspaper
indicating therein the purpose and arrangements being made to service the
depositors, etc.
requirements.object: months public notice prior to the date of closure of any of its branches/offices in, at least, one leading national newspaper and

requirements.full_sentence:
All transactions of the NBFC, including payment of interest on deposits/ charging
of interest on advances, shall be rounded off to the nearest rupee, i.e., fractions
of 50 paise and above shall be rounded off to the next higher rupee and fractions
of less than 50 paise shall be ignored.
requirements.object: the nearest rupee, i

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be ensured that cheques/drafts
issued by clients containing fractions of a rupee shall not be rejected by them.

Providing safe deposit locker facility is a fee-based service and shall not be
reckoned as part of the financial business carried out by NBFCs.
requirements.object: of the financial business carried out by NBFCs

requirements.full_sentence:
NBFCs offering
safe deposit locker facility or intending to offer it, shall disclose to their customers
that the activity is not regulated by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: that the activity is not regulated by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The NBFC shall undertake appropriate measures to ensure compliance
with the above Supreme Court Order, as applicable.
requirements.object: ensure compliance with the above Supreme Court Order, as applicable

conditions:
where a calamity has
been declared
requirements.full_sentence:
A NBFC at its discretion, may provide relief measures such as waiver / reduction
of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a calamity has
been declared, for a period not exceeding one year].
requirements.object: as waiver / reduction of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a calamity has been declared

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue
to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments
granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

if any, in case of delayed payment

(ii) Other penal charges

if any

(iii) Foreclosure charges

conditions: In case of lending under collaborative lending arrangements (e.g
In case of digital loans
requirements.full_sentence:
Part 2 (Other qualitative information)
1 Clause of Loan agreement relating to engagement of recovery agents
2 Clause of Loan agreement which details grievance redressal mechanism
3 Phone number and email id of the nodal grievance redressal officer (An NBFC may furnish generic email id, provided a response is made within 1 working day)
4 Whether the loan is, or in future maybe, subject to transfer to other REs or securitisation (Yes/ No)
5 In case of lending under collaborative lending arrangements (e.g., co- lending / outsourcing), following additional details may be furnished:
Name of the originating RE, along with its funding proportion
Name of the partner RE along
Blended rate of
with its proportion of funding
interest
6 In case of digital loans, following specific disclosures may be furnished:
(i) Cooling off / look-up period, in terms of the RE's board approved policy, during which borrower shall not be charged any penalty on prepayment of loan
requirements.object: on prepayment of loan
